channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: कबीर सोया क्या करे, उठि न भजे भगवान । जम जब घर में आइसी, तब नहिं जपे कमान ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Kabir, why do you sleep? Wake up and pray. When Death enters your house, you won't be able to pray.

Translation: Kabir, why sleep? Wake up and pray. When Death arrives, you cannot pray.
item.guid: कबीर सोया क्या करे, उठि न भजे भगवान । जम जब घर में आइसी, तब नहिं जपे कमान ॥493265

item.title: कबीरा गरब न कीजिये, ऊँचा देखि आवास । काल परों भुईं लेटना, ऊपर जमसी घास ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Do not be proud of your high mansion. Tomorrow you will lie in the dust, and grass will grow over you.

Translation: Be not proud of your high home. Tomorrow you lie in dust, covered in grass.
item.guid: कबीरा गरब न कीजिये, ऊँचा देखि आवास । काल परों भुईं लेटना, ऊपर जमसी घास ॥493266

item.title: रात गंवाई सोय के, दिवस गंवाया खाय । हीरा जनम अमोल था, कौड़ी बदले जाय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: The night was lost in sleep, the day in eating. This diamond-like life was priceless, but it's going for a penny.

Translation: Night lost to sleep, day to food. This priceless life is sold for a penny.
item.guid: रात गंवाई सोय के, दिवस गंवाया खाय । हीरा जनम अमोल था, कौड़ी बदले जाय ॥493267
